summary: Lead started M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 after M5 Gate PASS_WITH_LIMITS closure entered main. systems_architect writer thread 019f05c6-3b96-7da2-8a8a-7baf7d2ba53b is assigned to create the planning-only M6 Alpha task DAG.

tests_run.result: M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 was READY on main before start.
Spawned systems_architect writer thread 019f05c6-3b96-7da2-8a8a-7baf7d2ba53b, nickname Lintel.

decisions: Start M6 with a planning-only task graph task before implementation.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE: no manual node battle implementation or blocking M6/M7/M8 spike/research task is authorized.
Do not start downstream M6 implementation until this task graph is reviewed, accepted, merged, and closed.
risks: M6 scope is broad; systems_architect must keep downstream tasks dependency-ordered and non-overlapping.
Any attempt to reverse the manual node battle deferral is a Human Gate and is not authorized by this start.
requested_action: Create the minimal M6 Alpha system-complete task graph within M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 allowed paths and return a systems_architect REVIEW handoff.
